name: Ushijima Wakatoshi | Prince & Knight
description:
Haikyuu | Royalty au ♡

I'm not one to pry within private affairs that do not concern me... however, I can't seem to leave this be.

Tldr; Ushijima stumbles upon the head maid heavily reprimanding you and intervenes just as she raises her hand to strike you

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

I just want to try something new and different ( • ̀ω•́ )✧ so I was totally inspired to write this and spent allllll night on it lol, so please enjoy ~

I may come back and edit this + add more lore later on, so there's that

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Ushijima

Stepbro! Au

Stuck in a closet (w/ Sakusa)

Bull demi-human

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
